'''Shar'Ack''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Polyhedron59">{{PolyhedronCite|59|The New Rogues Gallery: Unsung Heroes of the Rebellion}}</ref> located in the [[Shar'Ack system/Legends|Shar'Ack system]], a part of the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==Behind the scenes==
===Publication information===
Shar'Ack was mentioned in "[[The New Rogues Gallery: Unsung Heroes of the Rebellion]]," an article written by [[Joe Littrell]] as a supplement for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and published in ''[[Polyhedron 59]]'' in [[May]] [[1991]].<ref name="Polyhedron59" /> The article is considered [[Canon|noncanonical]] with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="Unlicensed">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref>

However, [[Jason Fry]],<ref name="Fry">{{Twitter|jasoncfry|status/294887358405410816|[[Jason Fry]]|quote=Pretty much." {{C|In response to "the systems in the Atlas's appendix are named after their most prominent planet/celestial body, correct?"}} and "planets not assigned a system in [a] published source can be assumed to reside in [the] system of [the] same name.|archivefile=File:JasonFryAtlas.png|archiveurl=https://archive.is/zThQV}}</ref> co-author of the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'',<ref name="TEA" /> has [[:File:JasonFryAtlas.png|stated]] that the [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] listed in the book's Appendix section are named after the most prominent planets or celestial bodies located in those systems. This article therefore considers the existence of the planet Shar'Ack to be canonical with respect to the Legends continuity.<ref name="Fry" /> ''The Essential Atlas'' placed the Shar'Ack system in grid square L-5.<ref name="TEA" />

===The New Rogues Gallery: Unsung Heroes of the Rebellion===
{{Unlicensedstart}}
[[File:Tyric.png|thumb|right|250px|Shar'Ack was home to the Shaliz'Na, including Tyric (pictured; background).]]
A [[Forest/Legends|forested]] world, Shar'Ack was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Bird/Legends|avian]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known as the [[Shaliz'Na]]. The species produced many [[Artisan/Legends|artisans]], and in combat, its members preferred to use chemically-propelled [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrower]] weapons over off-world [[Laser/Legends|laser]] weaponry.<ref name="Polyhedron59" />

By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] controlled all [[Liquor/Legends|liquor]] manufactured on and imported to Shar'Ack. The Empire also [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] the Shaliz'Na, leading to many among the species to become addicted to [[Alcohol/Legends|alcohol]]. Around that time, the Shaliz'Na [[Musician/Legends|musician]] [[Tyric (Shaliz'Na)|Tyric]] had left his native Shar'Ack and was traveling throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], eventually joining the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="Polyhedron59" />
{{Unlicensedend}}
